reason: Successfully navigated to SuperAgent, selected the QA-20260507-211125-d7rm agent with idle status, sent the message "Hello! What is 2+2?", received the correct response "4" within 2 seconds.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with sidebar showing three agents in idle status.
Found "QA-20260507-211125-d7rm" agent in the sidebar — Agent located in the agent list with idle status indicator.
Clicked on the agent — Agent was selected and its home page loaded, showing agent status as "idle" with message input field.
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Status displayed as "idle" in the agent header (top right of main content area).
Clicked on the message input field — Input field became active and ready for typing.
Typed the message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message was successfully entered into the input field.
Clicked the "Send message" button — Message was sent, a new session "Basic Math Question Session" was created in the sidebar, and agent status changed to "working".
Waited for response — Agent processed the message and returned response within 2 seconds, status returned to "idle".

Verified response mentions "4" and took screenshot — Response displayed as "4", confirming correct mathematical answer. Screenshot captured showing message thread with user question and agent response.
